race.comment: This race has had a couple of key scratchings and leaves AMPING LASS (3) looking well placed. She's stuck on the 1 win from 10 outings but is close to another, running on well for a narrow defeat at Caulfield Heath last start when staying at 1000m. Up to 1200m should suit better now and she draws for every chance. HI VAL (4) resumes having run in some handy races last time in, she should track the pace here and has the ability to be challenging late. BLONDIE'S AWARD (7) brings the AMPING LASS form having been just behind that horse at a big price last time off an easy maiden win prior. Respecting. TAN TAT DELIGHT (6) was okay first up at Pakenham and should improve with Zahra booked from a good draw.
